title: Enhanced Offer Response - With Currency Information
description: Updated offer model now includes currency information for easy display in Flutter

isInternationalVendor.description: Is the vendor from US/UK? (copied from review)

exchangeRate.description: Exchange rate from review (USD->NGN or NGN->USD)

finalMaterialCostUSD.description: Final agreed material cost in USD (calculated when consent achieved)

finalWorkmanshipCostUSD.description: Final agreed workmanship cost in USD (calculated when consent achieved)

finalTotalCostUSD.description: Final agreed total cost in USD (calculated when consent achieved)

exampleResponse_NewOffer.scenario: Nigerian buyer creates offer to US vendor

chats.comment: Hello Can we get to negotiate a bit.

flutterDisplayLogic.note: For incoming offer, amounts are in NGN. Flutter can calculate USD using exchangeRate for display to vendor.

exampleResponse_VendorAccepts.scenario: US Vendor accepts Nigerian buyer's offer
exampleResponse_VendorAccepts.message: Offer accepted successfully. Waiting for buyer to confirm consent.

chats.comment: Hello Can we get to negotiate a bit.

flutterDisplayLogic.note: USD amounts now pre-calculated in finalMaterialCostUSD, finalWorkmanshipCostUSD, finalTotalCostUSD

exampleResponse_MutualConsent.message: Offer accepted successfully. Both parties have consented. You can now proceed to payment.

chats.comment: Hello Can we get to negotiate a bit.

flutterDisplayLogic.showSuccessBanner: Both parties agreed! Buyer pays ₦50,181, Vendor receives $35.00

exampleResponse_NigerianToNigerian.scenario: Nigerian buyer to Nigerian vendor (no currency conversion)

flutterDisplayLogic.note: Both see NGN amounts. No USD conversion needed since isInternationalVendor = false

flutterImplementationGuide.title: How to Display Amounts in Flutter
benefitsOfNewFields: No need to calculate USD amounts in Flutter - already provided
Easy to show buyer's country and vendor's country
Exchange rate readily available for display
Both NGN and USD amounts accessible without calculation

forInternationalVendor.note: Vendor sees both currencies for clarity

keyBenefits: ✅ All currency information in ONE response
✅ No need to fetch review separately for currency info
✅ Pre-calculated USD amounts when consent achieved
✅ Easy to display buyer and vendor countries
✅ Clear indication of international vs local transaction

migrationNote.existingOffers: Existing offers will have new fields set to defaults (false, 0, empty string). They will be populated on next update.
migrationNote.recommendedAction: Run a migration script to copy isInternationalVendor, exchangeRate from associated reviews to existing offers, or wait for natural updates.
